items.body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap` **Service directory:** `sdk/dependencymap/Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap/` **Triggered by:** commit c6e44de (PR #58562) by `@azure-sdk` ## What Changed `Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap` 1.0.0-beta.2 was just released (dependency upgrades to Azure.Core 1.53.0 and Azure.ResourceManager 1.14.0). The package has a rich set of resources and operations (including `DependencyMapResource`, `DependencyMapDiscoverySourceResource`, and long-running operations like `ExportDependencies`, `GetDependencyViewForAllMachines`, `GetConnectionsForProcessOnFocusedMachine`) but the README contains only boilerplate. ## Gaps Found - **Key concepts section** is entirely generic — links only to general Azure SDK docs with no description of `DependencyMapResource`, `DependencyMapDiscoverySourceResource`, or what the service does - **Examples section** contains no code snippets — only a link to a generic samples gallery; there are no `Samples/` test files backing any inline code - **No `Samples/` directory** exists under `tests/` — missing snippet-backed examples for CRUD operations and key operations such as `ExportDependencies` and `GetDependencyViewForAllMachines` - **Stale "Documentation" section** that is not part of the standard README template (should be folded into Getting Started or removed) - **API reference link** still uses the old `docs.microsoft.com` URL instead of `learn.microsoft.com`
📐 Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Modify files **Edit** `sdk/dependencymap/Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap/README.md` Replace the generic **Key concepts** section with: ```markdown ## Key concepts ### DependencyMap A `DependencyMapResource` represents an Azure Dependency Map instance scoped to a resource group. It stores the topology of discovered dependencies between machines and processes. Key operations include: - **Create / Update** — provision a new dependency map or update its tags - **Export Dependencies** — run a long-running operation to export the dependency graph - **Get Dependency View** — retrieve a dependency view for all machines or a focused machine - **Get Connections** — query network connections for a process on a focused machine ### DiscoverySource A `DependencyMapDiscoverySourceResource` is a child resource that describes a source from which dependency data is collected (for example, an Azure Monitor workspace). You can create, update, and delete discovery sources on a dependency map. ``` Remove the standalone `## Documentation` section (the links it contains are duplicated in Getting Started). Replace the generic **Examples** section with: ```markdown ## Examples - [Create a dependency map](#create-a-dependency-map) - [Get a dependency view for all machines](#get-a-dependency-view-for-all-machines) ### Create a dependency map ```C# Snippet:DependencyMap_CreateOrUpdate ``` ### Get a dependency view for all machines ```C# Snippet:DependencyMap_GetDependencyViewForAllMachines ``` ``` Fix the API reference URL in Getting Started: - Old: `(docs.microsoft.com/redacted) - New: `(learn.microsoft.com/redacted) ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets **Create** `sdk/dependencymap/Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap/tests/Samples/Sample1_DependencyMapCrud.cs` ```csharp // Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved. // Licensed under the MIT License. using System.Threading.Tasks; using Azure.Core.TestFramework; using Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap; using Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap.Models; using Azure.ResourceManager.Resources; using NUnit.Framework; namespace Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap.Tests.Samples { public class Sample1_DependencyMapCrud : SamplesBase { [Test] [AsyncOnly] public async Task CreateDependencyMapAsync() { #region Snippet:DependencyMap_CreateOrUpdate // Authenticate and get a subscription ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential()); SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync(); // Get or create a resource group string rgName = "myResourceGroup"; ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(rgName); // Create or update a DependencyMap string mapName = "myDependencyMap"; DependencyMapData data = new DependencyMapData(AzureLocation.EastUS); ArmOperation lro = await resourceGroup .GetDependencyMaps() .CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, mapName, data); DependencyMapResource dependencyMap = lro.Value; Console.WriteLine($"Created DependencyMap: {dependencyMap.Data.Name}"); #endregion } [Test] [AsyncOnly] public async Task GetDependencyViewForAllMachinesAsync() { #region Snippet:DependencyMap_GetDependencyViewForAllMachines ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential()); SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync(); ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync("myResourceGroup"); DependencyMapResource dependencyMap = await resourceGroup.GetDependencyMaps().GetAsync("myDependencyMap"); // Request a dependency view for all machines in the map GetDependencyViewForAllMachinesContent content = new GetDependencyViewForAllMachinesContent( DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.AddHours(-1), DateTimeOffset.UtcNow); ArmOperation lro = await dependencyMap.GetDependencyViewForAllMachinesAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, content); GetDependencyViewForAllMachinesOperationResult result = lro.Value; Console.WriteLine($"Dependency view status: {result.Status}"); #endregion } } } ``` Snippet-to-README mapping: | `#region` tag | README placeholder location | |---|---| | `Snippet:DependencyMap_CreateOrUpdate` | Under `### Create a dependency map` heading | | `Snippet:DependencyMap_GetDependencyViewForAllMachines` | Under `### Get a dependency view for all machines` heading | ### Step 3: Verify README structure Current README is missing or needs improvement in the following sections: | Section | Status | Action | |---|---|---| | Getting started > Install the package | ✅ Present | No change | | Getting started > Prerequisites | ✅ Present | No change | | Getting started > Authenticate the client | ✅ Present | No change | | Key concepts | ⚠️ Generic only | Replace with service-specific content (see Step 1) | | Examples | ❌ No code | Add snippet placeholders (see Step 1) | | Troubleshooting | ✅ Minimal but present | No change required | | Next steps | ✅ Present | No change | | Contributing | ✅ Present | No change | | Documentation (non-standard section) | ⚠️ Not in template | Remove or merge into Getting Started | Reference: `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md` for section formatting and tone. ### Step 4: Validate Run these commands in order: 1. `dotnet build sdk/dependencymap/Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap/` 2. `dotnet test sdk/dependencymap/Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap/ --filter TestCategory!=Live` 3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 dependencymap` — injects snippet code from the new sample file into README.md placeholder blocks; check `git diff` to confirm README updated 4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 dependencymap` — regenerates public API listing files (run if any public types changed) 5. `dotnet format sdk/dependencymap/Azure.ResourceManager.DependencyMap/` — ensures consistent code formatting
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
items.title: [DependencyMap] Docs: README lacks service-specific key concepts and code examples
